_comment: Claude API defaults for Vanorika content + copy generation.
This mirrors the 'settings.json' in the PASIM.IO guide, with two corrections:
1. The guide pins claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022, which is long superseded.
2. The guide's "permissions": "all" is not a real field in any Claude config.
The Messages API has no permissions key; Claude Code uses allow/deny rule
lists in .claude/settings.json. It is dropped here rather than copied.
This file is documentation of intended defaults - it is not read automatically
by anything. Point your own script at it, or use it as a checklist.

copy_and_content._use_for: Blog posts, landing page copy, social posts, outreach DMs.
copy_and_content._why: Higher temperature for range. Always attach brand-voice.md.

reports_and_client_docs._use_for: Pentest reports, audit findings, proposals, agreements, invoices.
reports_and_client_docs._why: Low temperature. These go to clients and must not drift or invent findings.

bulk_and_cheap._use_for: Summarising scan output, classifying leads, tidying data.
bulk_and_cheap._why: High volume, low judgement. Don't pay Opus prices for it.

house_rules: Never invent a statistic, client, testimonial, or scan result.
The '17+ businesses assessed' figure is UNVERIFIED - do not use it.
The /research/zimbabwe-web-security-2026 report contains PLACEHOLDER stats - do not cite it.
Never name a client or scan target publicly without written permission.
No AI attribution in any client-facing deliverable or repo commit. Author: Panashe Party.
British/Zimbabwean spelling: specialise, anonymised, enquiries, programme.
Prices are public and specific. Never soften to 'contact us for pricing'.
